creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Marcin Cieślak from comment #4)
> Shouldn't pkg upgrade complain about sqlite being too old?

It should try to upgrade direct dependencies. Maybe someone who works on pkg(8) knows why it didn't happen.

I can't help. Out of date dependencies when using binary packages are not supported at all: few libs if any support *forward* ABI compatibility. With ports (from source) there's a leeway (some can be downgraded) but no handholding if build breaks.
